title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #2, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #8, Whitebeard as the scene develops across pages 14–17.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: What are you guys doing here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We were buried, or more like

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Hmm... so you sure you won't talk?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: N-A-C-C-B-1: I'm not sure if you

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Eh!? Hey, don't sell out your friends!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: It's OK if he isn't around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I... was watching. You're horrendous strong.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Will you let me talk a little!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: An old guy with major injuries!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Like we said, it's a zombie!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You can just be a zombie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Even his original bounty surpasses yours, Luffy....!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #2, Franky, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #8, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: turning point.
